name: Jean Hardin's Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in 1/2 the butter until onions are soft.
2. Add salt, pepper, soup, and sour cream to the pan. Stir until everything is well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture over the hash browns that have been spread evenly in a greased 9x13 inch casserole dish.
4. Melt the remaining butter and mix it with the corn flake crumbs.
5. Spread the crumb topping evenly over the casserole.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
Note: I typically use only half of the butter specified, often opting for margarine instead. Stirring the mixture into the hash browns to coat them well is recommended.
